story.iWant: the Slide Builder directory structure created following BMAD patterns
story.soThat: all workflows have a consistent home and state files have designated locations

subtasks.subtask: Create `templates/` subdirectory for HTML layout templates
Create `samples/` subdirectory for sample deck slides
Create `deck/slides/` nested directories for deck mode
Create or update `.gitignore` file in project root
Add `.slide-builder/credentials/` entry to protect OAuth tokens
Verify entries don't duplicate existing gitignore rules
Run `npm init -y` if package.json doesn't exist
Add puppeteer to dependencies (for HTML-to-image conversion)
Add googleapis to dependencies (for Google Slides API)
Verify package.json has valid JSON structure
Run scaffolding command a second time
Verify no errors occur on re-run

criterion.description: Given the user runs the initialization command, when scaffolding completes, then the `.slide-builder/` directory structure exists with: `workflows/`, `templates/`, `samples/`, `single/`, `deck/slides/`, `credentials/`, `theme-history/`
criterion.verification: ls -la .slide-builder/ shows 7 subdirectories; ls .slide-builder/deck/ shows slides/

criterion.description: A `package.json` exists with puppeteer and googleapis dependencies
criterion.verification: cat package.json shows puppeteer and googleapis in dependencies

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: The `.slide-builder/` directory mirrors `.bmad/` with workflows/, templates/, samples/, single/, deck/slides/, credentials/, theme-history/

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: Mirror BMAD's workflow.yaml + instructions.md architecture exactly. 100% alignment requirement from PRD.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.snippet: mkdir -p .slide-builder/{workflows,templates,samples,single,deck/slides,credentials,theme-history}; npm init -y; npm install puppeteer googleapis

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: AC1.1.1: Directory structure with 7 subdirectories. AC1.1.2: .gitignore with credentials and node_modules. AC1.1.3: package.json with dependencies.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Creates all required directories in single operation. Initializes package.json with dependencies. Creates .gitignore with security entries. Idempotent (safe to run multiple times).

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: First story in Epic 1. Creates .slide-builder/ directory structure mirroring BMAD patterns. Prerequisites: None (first story).

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: FR48-52: Each command maps to workflow definition. Workflows have instruction files. Phase execution with checkpoints. State in YAML. Framework extensible.

code.note: This is a greenfield project. No existing .slide-builder/ directory, package.json, or .gitignore exists. All files will be created new.

constraints.constraint: 100% alignment with BMAD pattern - no custom directory patterns
credentials/ directory MUST be gitignored for security
All directories must be created in a single idempotent operation
Dependencies installed now but used in Epic 7 (forward planning)
State files must be human-readable YAML for manual recovery

interface.name: npm initialization
interface.signature: npm init -y && npm install puppeteer googleapis

tests.standards: Per tech-spec Test Strategy: Unit tests verify each directory exists after scaffolding. Integration tests run initialization and verify complete structure. Idempotency tests run twice and verify no errors or duplicates. Edge cases include missing Node.js (clear error) and permission denied (graceful fail). All testing is manual verification in Claude Code CLI environment.

locations.location: Manual CLI verification via ls, cat commands
No automated test framework in Epic 1 scope

ideas.idea: Run mkdir command, then `ls -la .slide-builder/` to verify 7 directories exist
Run `ls .slide-builder/deck/` to verify slides/ subdirectory exists
Run `cat .gitignore` to verify .slide-builder/credentials/ and node_modules/ entries present
Run `cat package.json` to verify puppeteer and googleapis in dependencies
Run scaffolding twice to verify idempotency - no errors on second run
Verify existing files preserved on re-run (create test file in directory, run again, verify file still exists)
